name: Fun School: Chapter 1
short_description: You play as an electrical technician tasked with shutting down the power to an abandoned school—except, somehow, it mysteriously turned back on. What seems like a routine job quickly spirals into a nightmarish experience as you uncover the dark secrets hidden within the school's halls.
detailed_description:
In Fun School, you play as an electrical technician tasked with shutting down the power to an abandoned school—except, somehow, it mysteriously turned back on. What seems like a routine job quickly spirals into a nightmarish experience as you uncover the dark secrets hidden within the school's halls.

What to Expect:

🕹 Immersive Horror Gameplay – Experience a graphically stunning first-person horror game set in a dark, abandoned 1900s-era private boarding school, where every shadow hides a secret.

🧩 Unique Puzzles – Solve environmental puzzles that cleverly integrate with the decayed school setting, forcing you to think outside the box to progress.

👁 Unpredictable Enemies – You are not alone. entities stalk you through the school, striking when you least expect it. Stay alert and beware of the unknown.

📖 Deep Lore & Story – Fun School is heavily story-driven, packed with mysteries, hidden clues, and a deep backstory. Piece together the dark past of the school—if you dare.

⏳ Chapter 1 Playtime: ~30 minutes

(Future chapters and DLCs are planned to expand the experience to 1+ hour of gameplay.)
